description: The Iranian People's Fadai Guerrillas (IPFG) is a splinter organisation that broke away from the [Organization of Iranian People's Fadai Guerrillas](/orgs/organization-of-iranian-peoples-fadai-guerrillas) after the 1980 split. Unlike both the [Fadaiyan-e Khalq (Majority)](/orgs/fadaiyan-e-khalq-majority), which moved toward collaboration with the Islamic Republic, and the [Fadaiyan-e Khalq (Minority)](/orgs/fadaiyan-e-khalq-minority), which maintained a militant opposition stance, the IPFG represented a smaller current committed to the original armed struggle line of the Fadaiyan tradition. It operates in exile and maintains the heritage of the pre-revolutionary guerrilla organisation while remaining a marginal force in post-revolutionary Iranian opposition politics.
editorial_notes: Distinct from both Majority and Minority factions. Smaller armed-struggle continuity group.
